§ 01Deal Status Summary

Dear {{cpaName}},

This update summarizes the current status of the ESOP transaction for {{companyName}} and identifies any CPA-dependent items requiring attention.

Status Update
Transaction {{dealStatus}}
{{currentPhase}}
{{nextMilestone}}
{{targetClosingDate}}
§ 02Quality of Earnings Progress

The independent QofE appraiser is conducting the quality of earnings analysis as required by the trustee and lender. Below is the current status of CPA-related data.

A.Financial statements provided: {{financialStatementsStatus}}
B.Tax returns (3 years): {{taxReturnsStatus}}
C.Working papers / reconciliations: {{workingPapersStatus}}
D.Normalization adjustments: {{normalizationStatus}}
E.Revenue / expense breakdowns: {{breakdownsStatus}}
Current variance: {{qofeVarianceNote}}
§ 03§1042 Tax Election Timeline

For sellers electing §1042 capital gains deferral, the following dates are critical. Coordination with your firm will be essential to ensure timely filing.

1.ESOP closing date: {{closingDate}} — this triggers the 1042 election clock
2.§1042 election deadline: {{election1042Deadline}} — due with the seller's tax return for the year of sale (including extensions)
3.Qualified Replacement Securities (QRS): Seller has {{reinvestmentWindow}} days from sale to reinvest proceeds in QRS
4.ESOP plan tax return (Form 5500): Due {{form5500Due}} — plan year-end following closing
5.Employer stock contribution deduction: Applicable for the tax year in which the ESOP acquires shares
Action required: Please confirm you have reviewed the §1042 election requirements with {{sellerName}} and that your firm will be preparing the necessary filings.
§ 04Outstanding CPA Items

The following items are needed from your firm to maintain the transaction timeline:

1.{{outstandingItem1}}: {{outstandingItem1Details}} — needed by {{outstandingItem1Deadline}}
{{#if outstandingItem2}}
2.{{outstandingItem2}}: {{outstandingItem2Details}} — needed by {{outstandingItem2Deadline}}
{{/if}} {{#if outstandingItem3}}
3.{{outstandingItem3}}: {{outstandingItem3Details}} — needed by {{outstandingItem3Deadline}}
{{/if}} {{#if outstandingItem4}}
4.{{outstandingItem4}}: {{outstandingItem4Details}} — needed by {{outstandingItem4Deadline}}
{{/if}}
Timeline note: {{deadlineContext}}
§ 05Next Steps

Here is what to expect over the coming weeks:

A.Next update: {{nextUpdateDate}} — Forhemit will provide the next coordination update
B.QofE delivery target: {{qofeTargetDate}} — appraiser expects to deliver draft findings
C.Pre-closing meeting: {{preClosingMeetingDate}} — joint call to align on closing package and tax filings

D.{{additionalNextStepTitle}}: {{additionalNextStepDetails}}
{{/if}}
